reviews.review_description: This is the best game to play with friends or other people it can be competitive or you can play around in solo there are 3 game modes that are brilliant this should be vr game of the year if enough people joined it

reviews.review_description:
This game is FAST, FREE, and straight-up HYPE! Devs actually listen in Discord and are cooking up sick modifiers, power-ups, and drippy cosmetics.  

Super easy to pick up—I ran two lobbies in Duos and Trios last night, both were GG and it was straight chaos (in the best way). Hits different from other ball games but still feels clean. If you ball in VRFS, Prem Player, or any VR sports, you’ll be cracked at this in no time.  

Perfect mix of casual and sweaty. This one’s a W!  
5⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

developer_response.body:
😍💞😍💞😍

Thanks for the kind words. Jump in Discord!
https://discord.com/invite/s9vYe4G3jG

cheers

HEXBALL TEAM

reviews.review_title: Best VR Football game I've ever played!
reviews.review_description:
This game is so fun with friends and so beginner friendly! If you are not strong in swinging your arms for shooting like in VRFS or other games, then this is for you!

It will generate a lot of power with a medium powered kick! This helps so you can play without being good at swinging your arms or other stuff! 

GET IT NOW!

developer_response.body:
Serb! Some of the team had the pleasure of playing with you in BETA....  and you have skills!!!

Many thanks for playing and helping us shape.
Look forward to more input in the Discord.

Thanks for the kind words and rating!! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

reviews.review_description: Really fun game. Just needs more people to apprechiate this masterpiece!

5⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ is really appreciated!

Hope to see you in the Discord or the lobbies/ tikt tok channels.

reviews.review_description: Hexball is probably the best game I have ever played on my vr . It's very unique and the Devs have put loads and loads of efforts into this game . I love this game because the Devs hear your opinions and if there's a bug they are always there to help . If you are seeing this please download this game and support the Devs effort to make this game one of the best (which in my opinion already is).

developer_response.body:
WINTALDO 🥹🥹
What can we say that makes us a happy team!! As an OG player of Rezzil Player as well and some of our other games it is great to hear. We will keep listening  in all comments especially our discord and hope to play you again soon!!! Watch out for next weeks update its got capture features and something a bit mad!

appreciate you and the 5⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

HEXBALL TEAM

reviews.review_title: Hexball is an AMAZING free game!
reviews.review_description: Hexball is seriously one of the most fun VR games I’ve played. It’s fast, competitive, and every match feels different thanks to the wild modifiers that keep you on your toes. Whether you’re playing with friends or jumping into quick games, it’s always a blast. The community is great too — loads of energy and good vibes. If you’re into football or just want a fun, skill-based VR game, this is a must-play.

developer_response.body:
Thanks Liam, 
We love that you love our growing game!
We have some quick play features coming soon!
Look forward to seeing you in the Arena!
Thanks for the 5 ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ review too!
Yours 
The Duchess of Hexball!

reviews.review_title: The Most Fun I’ve Had Playing VR!
reviews.review_description:
This game is soo much fun, soo fast paced and lots of potential as the developers are involved in the community soo much! 

They’ve worked soo hard on this game to be released this early and everyone is soo nice in the game, lots of awesome features and just a really nice break from other VR football games

OVERALL AMAZING GAME AND KEEP UP THE GREAT WORK!

Yours

reviews.review_title: The PERFECT mix of skill & fun 🔥
reviews.review_description: Hexball is deceptively simple. Easy to learn, brutally hard to master. The skill gap is real, making it incredibly addictive. Perfect blend of fun and challenge. If you like skill-based games, grab this.
